title: cleyera japonica var. taipinensis
intro: Cleyera japonica var. taipinensis, also known as Taiwan holly or Chinese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylaceae. It is a medicinal plant with various health benefits, traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throat, and skin infections. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Cleyera japonica var. taipinensis is used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
